name: Sproutly

brand_fit.recommendation: Sproutly trifft den Kern des Konzepts sehr gut – 'Sprout' evoziert Wachstum und Pflanzenwelt, das '-ly' Suffix verleiht Leichtigkeit und App-Charakter. Risiko: Im englischsprachigen App-Store existieren ähnlich klingende Plant-Care-Apps (z.B. Plantly, Sprout), was Trademark-Prüfung und ASO erfordert.

dominant_competitors: Sproutly: AI Plant Identifier - App Store - Apple
‎Sproutly Inc for iPhone - App Store - Apple
Sproutly - Idle Tree Garden - Apps on Google Play
Sproutly Mobile - Apps on Google Play

hard_blockers: trademark_conflict: DPMA or EUIPO match found
both_stores_taken: Name taken on Apple AND Google
soft_blockers: social_partial: Handle taken on Instagram, TikTok, X
aso_saturated: High keyword saturation in stores
recommendations: CRITICAL: Hard blockers detected. Name cannot proceed.
Check exact store listing names - slight variations may work
ASO: Highly saturated keyword space - differentiation needed
Social handles limited - consider adding a prefix (get/my/the)
